namespace analyze_social_network {

  std::string user2_name;
};

std::vector<FriendConnection> analyze_social_network_impl(const std::vector<User>& users, const std::vector<Friendship>& friendships) {

  // Build the query for mutual friends
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;

  auto query = sqlgen::read<std::vector<FriendConnection>>
      | sqlgen::select_from<User, "u1">("username"_t1.as<"user1_name">)
      | sqlgen::inner_join<Friendship, "f1">("user_id1"_t1 == "user_id"_t1 && "user_id2"_t1 == "user_id"_t2)
      | sqlgen::inner_join<User, "u2">("user_id2"_t1 == "user_id"_t2)

      | sqlgen::where(sqlgen::exists(

      ))
      | sqlgen::group_by("u1"_t1, "u2"_t1)
      | sqlgen::having(sqlgen::count() > 0);

  // Execute the query

  // Map the result to FriendConnection

  for (const auto& res : result) {
    connections.push_back(FriendConnection{.user1_name = res.user1_name, .user2_name = res.user2_name});
  }

  return connections;
}

}  // namespace analyze_social_network

```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace weekday_sales_analysis {

struct Sales {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> sale_id;
  int product_id;
  int quantity;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> sale_time;
};

struct WeekdayStats {
  int weekday;
  int total_quantity;
};

/**
 * Description: This function analyzes sales data to calculate total quantity sold for each weekday.
 * Returns: std::vector<WeekdayStats>.
 */
std::vector<WeekdayStats> weekday_sales_analysis() {
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;

  // Connect to the database
  auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_result) {
    // If connection fails, return empty vector
    return {};
  }
  auto conn = *conn_result;

  // Build the query
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Sales>(
      sqlgen::weekday("sale_time"_c).as<"weekday">(),
      sqlgen::sum("quantity"_c).as<"total_quantity">()
  ) | sqlgen::group_by(sqlgen::weekday("sale_time"_c));

  // Execute the query
  auto result = query(conn);
  if (!result) {
    return {};
  }

  // Convert the result to vector of WeekdayStats
  std::vector<WeekdayStats> stats;
  for (auto& row : *result) {
    stats.push_back(WeekdayStats{
        .weekday = row.weekday,
        .total_quantity = row.total_quantity
    });
  }

  return stats;
}

}  // namespace weekday_sales_analysis
```
